security.valueCandidate: VEED says it complies with GDPR and the CPPA and uses access controls and security audits.
security.snippet: VEED's enterprise and security pages describe data protection by design, GDPR / CPPA compliance, access controls, and recurring security audits.

api.valueCandidate: VEED Lip Sync API accepts standard video and audio formats and returns MP4 output.
api.snippet: The Lip Sync API page documents MP4/MOV/WebM/M4V video inputs, MP3/OGG/WAV/M4A/AAC audio inputs, and MP4 output URLs.

api.valueCandidate: VEED Fabric 1.0 is an image-to-video API for longer talking-head outputs.
api.snippet: The Fabric 1.0 API page positions the model as a scalable image-to-video API that creates lifelike talking videos from image and audio inputs.

enterprise.valueCandidate: VEED Enterprise includes Brand Kit, custom templates, custom avatars, and shared workspaces.
enterprise.snippet: The enterprise page says teams can store logos, fonts, colors, media, templates, custom avatars, and use shared workspaces with comments and review.

enterprise.valueCandidate: VEED offers SSO options for Enterprise users.
enterprise.snippet: The security FAQ states that SSO is available for Enterprise plan users.
